name: GTM Outbound Sequence Preparation
description: Prepare a reviewed outreach sequence from qualified leads and account context.
whenToUse: Use this when you want to prepare a reviewed outreach sequence from qualified leads and account context.
Best for sales and go-to-market teams that want repeatable work without changing the tools they already use.

stages.title: Orient From Outbound Context
stages.summary: Read lead context, prior sequences, touchpoints, send policy, and outbound lessons.

stages.title: Prepare Sequence
stages.summary: Prepare reviewed prospect groups, messaging refs, task needs, and approval notes.

stages.title: Optional Outbound Actions
stages.summary: Execute approved connected app sequence, mail, or calendar actions only when granted by the concrete plan.
